string EntryAbility_desc 0x01000004
string EntryAbility_label 0x01000005
string app_name 0x01000001
string module_desc 0x01000006
string read_calendar_reason 0x01000008
string write_calendar_reason 0x01000009
color start_window_background 0x01000002
media app_icon 0x01000000
media icon 0x0100000a
media startIcon 0x01000003
profile main_pages 0x01000007
